---
title: "Foundations of Agent-Based Modeling: Design, Implementation, and Validation"
subtitle: "ABM-001 | Track C — Agent-Based Modeling"
description: "Agent-based models simulate complex systems from the bottom up. This textbook covers the design principles, computational frameworks, and validation methodology for building rigorous ABMs."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Foundations of Agent-Based Modeling: Design, Implementation, and Validation

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
